summary:
After reviewing the retrieved evidence, I find no link between GRHL2 overexpression and EMT—even though GRHL2 maintains epithelial integrity. The absence of any documented mechanism connecting GRHL2 to EMT means the original conclusion holds.  

$\boxed{B}$
